positive: A whimsical and detailed scene featuring a stylized crescent moon hanging over a forest of bioluminescent flora. The main subject is a group of elegant, stylized hummingbirds hovering near oversized, glowing pitcher plants. The composition should be centrally focused, giving a strong, symmetrical silhouette of the flora against a dark, deep indigo night sky. Use neon accents of electric teal, glowing emerald, and soft lavender for the light sources. The style must be highly graphic, clean line art mixed with deep, vibrant colors, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The atmosphere should be mystical and ethereal, with strong contrast between the light-emitting elements and the dark background. Perfect for a repetitive, yet unique, pattern print.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, ugly, low quality, cropped, watermark, signature, text, words, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, poorly drawn, low detail, photographic, photorealistic, out of frame
